title: Remote Code Execution via Shellshock in CGI endpoint
description: Remote code execution vulnerability detected in the /cgi-bin/status endpoint. A Shellshock-style payload in the User-Agent header caused the server to execute the 'id' command and return its output in the HTTP response headers ('X-Exec-Result: uid=33(www-data) gid=33(www-data)').
remediation: Upgrade Bash to a patched version (4.3+), disable unnecessary CGI scripts, and implement strict input validation on all HTTP headers passed to CGI processes.
